bracu_official.title: BRAC University Law Graduate Awarded Prestigious Joint Doctoral Scholarship Between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has been awarded a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The new executive committee of the BRAC University law alumni association has taken charge for the 2026–2028 term.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University hosts workshops on case solving, strategic decision-making and AI
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University hosted workshops focusing on case solving, strategic decision-making, and artificial intelligence.

bracu_official.title: Last Date of Payment for Summer 2026
bracu_official.summary: The deadline for payment for the Summer 2026 semester is June 27.
